entities.description: Cajanus cajan plants used in the field treatment

entities.description: A specific strain of Rhizobium used for inoculating the field

entities.name: INOCULATION METHOD
entities.description: A process of applying rhizobia by mixing peat, sand, and jaggery, then broadcasting and harrowing

entities.description: The formation of nodules on the roots of the plants as a result of inoculation

entities.name: PEAT

entities.name: COARSE RIVER SAND
entities.description: A material mixed with peat to facilitate the broadcasting process

entities.name: JAGGERY
entities.description: Brown unrefined sugar used as an additive in the inoculation mixture

entities.name: WATER
entities.description: Liquid used to wet the mixture of peat, sand, and jaggery

entities.description: The specific time period when the inoculation treatment was conducted

entities.name: FIELD
